case_title: BLANCA CIFUENTES VS. AJACKS RESTAURANTS LLC,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CIFUENTES, BLANCA AS TO DEFENDANT AJACKS RESTAURANTS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CIFUENTES, BLANCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AJACKS RESTAURANTS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $12,086.76 PRINCIPAL, $2,076.20 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,532.96, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
